message:
⚡ perf: race mission lookups — resolve on first success, cancel rest (#2897)

Promise.all waits for ALL 13 directory lookups to complete even though
only 1 succeeds. With cold Netlify Functions this meant waiting for 12
slow 404s (~1-2s each), causing ~10s load times on first visit.

Fix: use AbortController to cancel remaining in-flight requests as
soon as the first path returns a valid mission. With warm CDN cache
this resolves in ~150ms instead of ~400ms. With cold functions the
improvement is dramatic (seconds saved).

Applied to both MissionLandingPage and MissionSidebar import handler.

Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>
